title: angelica tianmuensis
intro: Angelica tianmuensis is a rare species of flowering plant in the carrot family, native to China, and is also known as the Tianmu angelica. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Angelica tianmuensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, as well as having antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Angelica tianmuensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
